passiveAbilities.name: Brute Strength
passiveAbilities.description: Increase all Melee Dmg dealt by +2.

passiveAbilities.name: Ramshackle Armour
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all non-Magical Dmg suffered by -1.

passiveAbilities.name: Bodyguard
passiveAbilities.description: If a friendly Noble within 4” and LoS suffers Dmg, you may have this character suffer all that Dmg instead.

activeAbilities.name: Ooga-booga!
activeAbilities.description: Move target enemy Goblin 2” directly away.

signatureMove.name: Kick to the Guts
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of Melee, then it loses 1 energy and is moved 1” directly away from this model.
